summary: Comprehensive iOS architecture remediation plan addressing critical service implementations, security configurations, MVVM pattern violations, and code organization issues identified in the audit. Plan prioritizes blocking issues first, followed by architectural improvements and quality enhancements.

phases.description: Address blocking issues preventing app compilation and basic functionality. Focus on service implementations, security foundations, and architectural decisions that enable development to proceed.

issues.title: Resolve Dual Mobile Implementation Strategy
issues.description: Two separate mobile implementations exist (native iOS and Flutter wrapper), creating maintenance overhead and development confusion. Decision required on single implementation path.
issues.recommendation: Archive Flutter wrapper and commit to native iOS implementation for superior platform integration, performance, and maintainability.

tasks.task: Decision consultation with stakeholders on implementation strategy
tasks.explanation: Business decision required before technical implementation
tasks.notes: Requires stakeholder input on mobile platform strategy - native iOS vs Flutter wrapper approach

tasks.task: Archive Flutter wrapper directory if native iOS is chosen
tasks.explanation: Move Flutter wrapper to archived directory or remove entirely to eliminate confusion and maintenance overhead

tasks.task: Update documentation to reflect single implementation strategy

issues.title: Implement Missing Core Services
issues.description: ServiceLocator references multiple services that don't exist, preventing app compilation. All referenced services must be implemented with basic functionality.
issues.recommendation: Create service implementations following dependency injection patterns with proper protocols for testability and future extensibility.

tasks.task: Create PortfolioService with Supabase integration
tasks.explanation: Protocol-based service following SOLID principles with async/await support for modern Swift concurrency

tasks.task: Create TransactionService for transaction management
Create DocumentService for PDF and statement handling
tasks.explanation: Implements secure document handling with signed URLs per security requirements

tasks.task: Create WithdrawalService for withdrawal request management
Create AdminService for admin-only operations
tasks.explanation: Admin operations must be secured with proper RLS policies on backend

tasks.task: Create RealtimeService for live data subscriptions
Create OfflineManager for offline data synchronization
Update ServiceLocator to properly initialize all services
tasks.explanation: Proper dependency injection order with repositories initialized before services

issues.title: Implement Missing Security Components
issues.description: Security managers referenced in code don't exist, and environment configuration is incomplete. Critical for production readiness.
issues.recommendation: Implement security managers with proper certificate pinning, jailbreak detection, and environment-specific configuration.

tasks.task: Create CertificatePinningManager for MITM protection
tasks.explanation: Implements certificate pinning for Supabase connections to prevent MITM attacks

tasks.task: Create SecurityManager with jailbreak detection
tasks.explanation: Basic jailbreak detection for security compliance

tasks.task: Create environment configuration files
tasks.explanation: Environment-specific configurations preventing production credentials in development

tasks.task: Update SupabaseConfig to use environment configurations
tasks.code_sample:
struct SupabaseConfig {
    static var current: SupabaseConfig {
        #if DEBUG
        return development
        #elseif STAGING
        return staging
        #else
        return production
        #endif
    }
    
    let url: String
    let anonKey: String
    let environment: String
    
    static let development = SupabaseConfig(
        url: Bundle.main.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "SUPABASE_URL") as! String,
        anonKey: Bundle.main.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "SUPABASE_ANON_KEY") as! String,
        environment: "development"
    )
}
tasks.explanation: Environment-aware configuration preventing hardcoded credentials

phases.description: Implement missing architectural patterns and fix layer violations. Focus on Repository pattern, ViewModel implementations, and proper separation of concerns.

issues.title: Implement Repository Pattern for Data Layer
issues.description: Repository interfaces and implementations referenced but missing. Critical for testability and clean architecture principles.
issues.recommendation: Implement repository pattern with protocols for each data entity, providing abstraction over Supabase and Core Data persistence layers.

tasks.task: Create PortfolioRepository with Core Data and Supabase integration
tasks.explanation: Repository with cache-first strategy and offline support

tasks.task: Create TransactionRepository
Create StatementRepository
Create WithdrawalRepository

issues.title: Create Missing ViewModels
issues.description: Multiple ViewModels referenced in Views but not implemented, preventing compilation and proper MVVM separation.
issues.recommendation: Implement ViewModels following ObservableObject pattern with proper error handling, loading states, and service dependencies.

tasks.task: Create DashboardViewModel
tasks.explanation: MainActor ViewModel with proper async/await patterns and error handling

tasks.task: Create PortfolioViewModel
Create AdminDashboardViewModel
Create TransactionViewModel
Update Views to use dependency injection for ViewModels
tasks.explanation: Proper dependency injection pattern avoiding direct ViewModel creation in Views

issues.title: Fix Architecture Layer Violations
issues.description: Business logic mixed with presentation layer and improper dependency patterns identified in several Views.
issues.recommendation: Move business logic to ViewModels, implement proper dependency injection, and enforce architectural boundaries.

tasks.task: Add ViewModel factory methods to ServiceLocator
tasks.explanation: Factory methods enable proper dependency injection while maintaining ServiceLocator as single dependency

tasks.task: Remove direct service dependencies from Views
tasks.explanation: Views should only depend on ViewModels, not services directly

tasks.task: Extract business logic from Views to ViewModels
tasks.explanation: Move data loading, transformation, and state management to ViewModels

phases.description: Address medium priority issues including view decomposition, model consolidation, and code organization improvements.

issues.title: Decompose Large View Files
issues.description: DashboardView (545 lines) and AuthenticationView (350 lines) are monolithic and should be split into smaller, reusable components.
issues.recommendation: Extract view components into separate files, create reusable UI components, and improve SwiftUI preview support.

tasks.task: Extract DashboardView components into separate files
tasks.explanation: Extracting components improves reusability, testability, and SwiftUI preview performance

tasks.task: Extract TwoFactorView from AuthenticationView
tasks.explanation: 2FA UI is complex enough to warrant separate file and has independent preview requirements

tasks.task: Create shared UI component library
tasks.explanation: Shared components reduce duplication and ensure consistent UI patterns

issues.title: Consolidate Duplicate Model Definitions
issues.description: Same models defined in multiple files creating maintenance issues and potential inconsistencies.
issues.recommendation: Create single source of truth for data models, remove duplicates, and establish clear model organization.

tasks.task: Remove duplicate Portfolio model from SupabaseService
tasks.explanation: Keep model definition in Models/Portfolio.swift and remove from service files

tasks.task: Audit and consolidate all duplicate models
tasks.explanation: Systematic review of all model definitions to eliminate duplicates

tasks.task: Create model extensions for computed properties
tasks.explanation: Organize formatting and UI-specific extensions separate from core models

issues.title: Improve State Management Patterns
issues.description: Inconsistent error handling and loading state management across ViewModels. Need standardized patterns.
issues.recommendation: Create standardized ViewState enum and error handling protocols for consistent UX patterns.

tasks.task: Create ViewState enum for standardized state management
tasks.explanation: Standardized state management reduces boilerplate and improves consistency

tasks.task: Create ErrorHandler protocol for centralized error handling
tasks.explanation: Centralized error handling improves debugging and user experience

tasks.task: Refactor ViewModels to use standardized state patterns
tasks.explanation: Apply consistent state management patterns across all ViewModels
